title: American Pan-Seared Fish
description: A classic American dish featuring a crispy pan-seared fish fillet, served with a side of nostalgic stir-fried vegetables.

ingredients.name: fish fillet
ingredients.notes: white fish such as cod or tilapia

instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan over medium-high heat.
2. Season the fish fillet with salt to taste.
3. Add a tablespoon of vegetable oil to the pan.
4. Sear the fish fillet for 3-4 minutes on each side, until cooked through.
5. Remove the fish from the pan and set aside.
6. Reduce heat to medium and add minced garlic to the pan.
8. Add thinly sliced onion and bell pepper to the pan.
9. Stir-fry for 3-4 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
10. Serve the pan-seared fish with a side of stir-fried vegetables.
